title: Cost of Debt: What is the impact on the value of a firm...
summary: Calculate the weighted average cost of capital or cost of equity using CAPM and capital structure data.
prompt: What is the impact on the value of a firm if it issues debt instead of equity, assuming all else remains constant?

options.text: Issuing debt can increase a firm's value due to the tax shield provided by

solution: Issuing debt can increase a firm's value due to the tax shield provided by interest payments, which are tax-deductible, creating a positive effect on the overall value of the firm.
